steps.title: Identify the contrast
steps.content: The passage sets up a contrast: 'many elements' were isolated quickly, but 'this wasn’t the case with all elements.' The blank precedes a specific example (radium) that illustrates this exception, requiring a transition signaling a shift to a contrasting detail.

steps.title: Apply the signal to the choices
steps.content: B) However introduces a direct contrast, aligning with the established tension between 'many' and 'not all.' A) Thus signals consequence (but the example doesn’t prove a result), C) Moreover implies addition (but the example isn’t additional support), and D) Sometimes fails as a transition word in this context. That matches choice B — B is correct.
